If branch is only ahead by this handoff checkpoint, either leave it for next work batch or push it after adding substantive follow-up changes; avoid triggering CI for checkpoint-only work unless desired.

Should generic StreamChunk final_tool_call eventually include structured tool-call metadata, or remain a terminal marker while synthesized provider JSON carries structured calls?
Which concrete web/UI consumer will first subscribe to StreamChunk/StreamSession nodes?
Should checkpoint-only .project commits be pushed immediately or batched with substantive changes?
